avatar_hint: JPG, PNG, GIF or WebP. Max 2 MB.
avatar_private_action: Action disabled: only the user can update their avatar from their profile.
avatar_private_notice: Private avatar: only the user can see and update it from their profile.
backend_language_hint: Choose the language used for your admin interface.
backend_language_scope_hint: Leave empty to follow the site's default language. This choice only affects your admin interface.
cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role.
cannot_delete_last_super_admin: Cannot delete the last super admin.
cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
cannot_downgrade_last_super_admin: Cannot downgrade the last super admin.
confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
confirm_remove_avatar: Do you really want to remove the avatar?
email_exists: This email is already in use.
file_too_large: The file is too large (max 2 MB).
name: Name
users_empty_text: No account matches the current filters. Create a new user or reset the view.
users_help_intro: Create accounts, assign the right role, then verify their status before granting access.
users_help_step_filters: Use filters to quickly find active, pending, or inactive accounts.
users_help_step_roles: Choose the lowest role each user actually needs.
users_help_step_security: Edit an account to adjust profile details, password, and visible information.
users_help_title: Manage access to the admin area
users_form_help_intro: Start with identity and login information, then assign the lowest useful role and finish with profile details visible in the admin area.
users_form_help_step_access: Set the role and, when editing, the status carefully: these choices control the real access level.
users_form_help_step_identity: Enter name, email, and, on creation, a valid password first.
users_form_help_step_profile: Finish with bio, contact details, and avatar only if the account needs a clear profile in the back office.
users_profile_help_intro: Keep your profile up to date to secure access to the admin area and remain identifiable to other administrators.
users_profile_help_step_identity: Check your name and email first because they drive your session and notifications.
users_profile_help_step_security: Change the password only when needed, then keep a strong combination.
users_profile_help_step_save: Save after each important change so your personal account stays consistent.

validation.required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
